title: Directed Graphs, Strong Components, and Condensation · Cost-Model Clinic: Cycle Witness
summary: Analyze circular dependencies and group mutually reachable services. Planned artifact: Add and verify the dsa2 cycle witness increment in a strongly-connected dependency report. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Return a concrete directed cycle witness for invalid dependency plans.
Collapse strong components into an acyclic condensation graph.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
